name: Portkeys PT5 II 5 Inch 4K HDMI Touchscreen Monitor
description: The PT5 II has been updated with improved heat dissipation with added holes on its enclosure to keep the monitor cool.

features.Key Features :: 5" 1920 x 1080 Touchscreen Display | 4K HDMI I/O, 3D LUT Import via USB Port | 500 cd/m² Bright/1000:1 Contrast Ratio | Updated with Heat Vents for Cooling | Focus Peaking, RGB & Luma Waveforms | False Color, Histogram & Audio Metering | 3.5mm Headphone Jack, On/Off Switch | DC Input, USB Type-A Output Port | Sunshade & Tilting Shoe Bracket | Optional L-Series & LP-E6 Plates
features.What's in the box?: PORTKEYS PT5 II 5" 4K HDMI Touchscreen Monitor with 3D LUT Support | Sun Hood Kit | Tilting Shoe Mount | HDMI Type-A Cable | Micro-HDMI Cable | Safety Case
